overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player moves along a palm-tree-lined promenade past neon-lit skyscrapers, futuristic streetlights, and digital billboards, eventually passing under a yellow pedestrian overpass. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, sparse pedestrian traffic, and light vehicle movement on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade adjacent to neon skyscraper

events.description: pedestrian in colorful clothing walks past the camera on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet promenade beside a multi-lane road, passing futuristic streetlights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera from right to left on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with glowing red and white signage and circular upper structure
row of palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront promenade
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights
tall pole with horizontal neon light bar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive circular neon-lit skyscraper on the right. The camera walks forward along a wet concrete promenade lined with palm trees on the left. A pedestrian passes by on the sidewalk, and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road to the right.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path with palm trees on the left and traffic on the right

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with yellow structural beams spanning across the road ahead
low-rise commercial structures with illuminated signage facing the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the skyscraper, the scene opens into a long palm-tree-lined promenade. The yellow pedestrian overpass becomes visible in the distance, while commercial buildings with bright signage line the right side of the road. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient neon lighting.

events.description: approaching the yellow pedestrian overpass structure
passing under the overpass into darker, semi-covered space

agents.ego_description: walking under the yellow overpass structure, passing vending machines and debris on the left

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with colorful display screen
large industrial trash bin with debris scattered nearby

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes beneath the yellow pedestrian overpass, transitioning from open sky to a semi-covered space. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed under the structure. Vending machines and trash containers appear on the left side of the walkway as the camera moves through the underpass area.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass back into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: emerging from under the overpass and approaching a commercial intersection with large digital billboards

entered.detail: low commercial building topped with massive curved digital billboard displaying advertisements
lit storefront awnings and signs along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass, the scene opens into a commercial intersection area. A prominent building with a large curved digital billboard dominates the view ahead. The camera continues along the waterfront path as vehicle traffic increases slightly on the right, with neon signs illuminating the commercial storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rainy cyberpunk waterfront that transitions from a vista of towering neon skyscrapers to a shadowed underpass and finally into a bright commercial intersection. It begins by moving past a massive circular neon-lit skyscraper on a wet concrete promenade lined with palm trees, where sparse traffic and a lone pedestrian drift through the ambient glow. As the camera advances, the view opens into a long stretch of the promenade where the wet pavement reflects bright commercial signage and a yellow pedestrian overpass appears in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes beneath the overpass, moving from the open night sky into a darker, shadowed space flanked by vending machines and trash containers. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass into a bustling intersection dominated by a large curved digital billboard and illuminated storefronts as vehicle traffic increases on the adjacent road.
